description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a circular glass door on the front. The exterior is primarily smooth and metallic, with subtle paneling and a few visible seams. The front face features a control panel above the door, which includes several dials and buttons for operation, as well as a possible detergent drawer on the left side. The sides are plain with recessed panels, and the back shows attached hoses and a molded panel for access. The washing machine stands on four small feet and has a robust, utilitarian appearance suitable for residential or commercial use. The overall finish is clean and uniform, with a light gray coloration.
description: A front-loading washing machine with a circular glass door, smooth metallic panels, and a control panel with dials and buttons above the door.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, recessed panel and a hose attached near the back.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular glass door, control panel with dials and buttons, and a possible detergent drawer on the upper left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar recessed panel and a hose running along the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the molded back panel, attached hoses, and no visible controls or door.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper front face, above the door, and features several rotary dials and push buttons arranged horizontally. There is also a possible detergent drawer on the left side of the panel.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading circular door with a glass window and a visible handle on the right side of the door.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left side of the front control panel, appearing as a rectangular pull-out compartment.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially visible through the glass door on the front
